title: Rolfsound WebSocket Protocol
description: Single source of truth for the WS envelope and all frame types.

id.description: UUID — required on intent.*, echoed in ack.*

namespaces.event: server -> client - user-visible or semantic event
namespaces.ack: server -> client - correlated response to intent (same id)

state.playback.description: Full playback snapshot. Sent on connect, on core events, throttled ≤ 4 Hz.

payload.title: string | null
payload.position_updated_at: number — unix-ms when position was sampled
payload.queue: array of compact queued track objects

state.queue.description: Full queue snapshot. Sent when queue is mutated.

state.remix.description: Remix parameters currently applied to the playback stream. Sent on connect and on every remix_changed event from core.

payload.stems_available: boolean — reserved for Phase 3, always false in Phase 0
payload.stems: array — reserved for Phase 3, empty in Phase 0

event.track_changed.description: Edge-trigger when the playing track changes.

event.track_finished.description: Edge-trigger when a track finishes naturally.

event.progress.description: Volatile latest-only 1 Hz sync tick during playback. Clients dead-reckon between ticks.

telemetry.audio.description: Volatile latest-only audio envelope, emitted at <= 20 Hz. Replaces legacy audio_monitor.

payload.enabled: boolean — reset remix on track change preference

qos.critical: Rare semantic events. Drop queued latest/volatile frames to make room; disconnect the slow client if the queue contains only critical frames.
qos.latest: Idempotent snapshots. Keep only the newest frame per type.
qos.volatile: Telemetry/progress. Keep only the newest frame per type; safe to drop.

backpressure.on_full: never grow memory; coalesce latest/volatile frames, drop discardable frames before critical frames, then disconnect a critically backpressured client

reconnection.on_reconnect: server sends state.playback immediately; client flushes IntentQueue (cap 16)
